review_title: Good virtual machine service, AMI catalog needs work, auto scaling is magic
description: Overall, good virtual machine service. The initial setup is difficult, but once done the service is reliable. Easy to setup a highly available application with EC2.
author: Monica G.
pros: The Auto Scaling Groups is where the magic happens. This helps with auto-healing and highly available applications. The launch templates are extremely customizable. The user data (pre boot scripts) are helpful. I appreciate the 3rd party integrations, like our CI/CD tool. The integration with auto scaling groups and ALBs are a must.
cons: Searching for AMIs in the AWS console is clunky. There should be better ways to search. The initial setup is tricky, but once you build one image and launch an instance, the deployment process gets easier. Occasionally, I will have to stop/start an instance because the underlying host has an issue. Thank goodness for autoscaling.

review_title: EC2 automation/simplicity all in one platform
description: It is a great tool, easy to use, easy to setup, clonable and each task can have a deedicated instance to run.
author: Richard R.
pros: The EC2 mechanism works great, rent when required, scalable and on demand computing makes this a great platform to use.
cons: Whilst it is cost effective, there are times when the cost is prohibitive for some small tasks, but otherwise it works as expected

review_title: I was forced to leave after 6 years of happy use
description: What AWS don't tell you is that on top of your EC2 cost comes a whole range of other hidden costs. Costs that only creep up after you've been using the product for a long time. Almost as if it has been designed this way. Specifically, I ran into trouble with CPU and Disk IO credits. This is not a thing on any other platform. EC2 allows you to "burst" your processing power or disk read/write speed. This is done automatically with no control from the administrator. Once the tokens run out, which is seemingly incalculable, the servers crash. The only way to keep the servers up is to keep spending more money by increasing the tokens (by raising the capacity), even though I didn't need the extra capacity. My servers are running perfectly on another provider now, on the lowest capacity instances, with no concept of "tokens" to worry about.
author: Greg B.
pros: EC2 is so easy to set up. It doesn't require any thought to what is happening "behind the scenes".
cons: It doesn't require any thought to what is happening "behind the scenes". When something breaks, you're on your own (without a minimum $2,000/mo support contract). AWS slowly increase the cost of associated tech with no way to understand why.

review_title: Scalable and Highly Available EC2 System
description: When I shift to ec2, it had many features like security groups, auto scaling and load balancer which made my application highly available and it was cost effective.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It made my backend very easy to scale and highly available without lagging.
cons: It was not beginner friendly had many complex terminology.

review_title: My first Experience of EC2
description: I would like to rate it 8 out of 10 as my most of the work got done by using EC2 only. But there are still some complexity in UI as I mentioned above.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The thing I liked about EC2 is I can get any operating system image to run my projects. Also without worrying about cpu load I can get as high specifications as I want
cons: The UI is little complex as I get to any options when I was just learning it got me too much confused.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Outstanding in terms of hosting and visual machines.
description: It's really responsive and there are variety of locations to choose from so, It's basically a best option among others considering the price we pay.
author: Nujan S.
pros: AWS's EC2 service is truly excellent. We'll have thousands of applications and operating systems ready to install. It's simple to use when configuring DNS or managing ports. It's incredibly straightforward, thanks to their clean UI. When we install software from the EC2 marketplace, everything is essentially pre-configured. Backup is simple with snapshots, but it will cost you money. We can choose the operating system and get an estimate of how much we'll pay. This will avoid unexpected charges.
cons: When you stop and restart an instance on EC2, the IP address changes constantly, which makes setting up DNS records quite inconvenient. There is an elastic IP approach that will prevent such, but I believe they should supply it by default for the same cost of instance. Also, support is quite slow, and we must pay an additional fee for it.

review_title: Cloud Computing that will scale from startups to large businesses
description: We are realizing the benefits of flexible cloud computing with superb reliability, scalability and uptime. As a startup, we can simply count on EC2 being sufficient on the long term.
author: Samuel C.
pros: Amazon EC2 is an extremely flexible cloud computing service. It is modern, complete, integrates easily with all other AWS services and comes at a great price with an ever-decreasing pricing that will simply give the customer more value. If it is your first cloud computing experience, you can start with a template that will facilitate the process of getting started, however, be mindful because templates may tie you up considerably in the future. EC2 is all about standards so you can expect to integrate absolutely everything in your infrastructure with ease. EC2 is the reason why I think bare metal servers do not make a lot of sense nowadays. Speaking about features, you've got them all and EC2 proves to be a nice gateway to keep using other AWS services. At first, it may be intimidating to implement since the interface is still a bit misleading. Once you understand it, you get your money worth by every penny. We started with EC2 almost 8 years ago and I absolutely haven't thought about replacing with an alternative for many years to come.
cons: EC2 interface still has a lot of room for improvement. I think that since it is so expansive, fitting everything in concisely in an interface is hard. I think that it has gotten better over time but never to the likes of DigitalOcean that is a superb functional and well-designed UI. Also, documentation is not very developer friendly (have you seen Mailgun's dev docs?) but it serves you well. Something there is documentation that is referring to another version of the service you are intending to use without you having a lot of notice, that's a catch. You should also know that just like Apple's ecosystem, AWS is also playing the same game, very difficult to export things should you ever have the need, so make a commitment or find somewhere else.

review_title: EC2 is the way to compute on cloud
description: Overall this is the first of its kind on cloud to provide compute service and it evolved since its introduced to finest levels
author: vidya P.
pros: Amazon EC2 comes with wide range of compute capacity and processors including graviton which are cheaper bundled with performance
cons: It can get expensive if not monitored closely on the EC2 usage.

review_title: Good Experience
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Server setup is so easy with this and also my website response is better with better with large services.
cons: Its little bit costly for managing different servers.

review_title: Amazon EC2 service
description: Amazon EC2 offers flexible, scalable computing power and a wide range of instance options. While it offers strong performance, cost management and instance monitoring require attention.
author: Swaibu B.
pros: Amazon EC2 offers scalable, on-demand computing power with flexible instance types, making it easy to tailor resources to workloads efficiently.
cons: Amazon EC2's pricing can be complex, and managing instances effectively requires careful monitoring to avoid unexpected costs.

review_title: EC2 for scaling business
author: Harish V.
pros: Scaling up and down the instances of EC2 can be really easy task which can can be cost effective. Best part about it is its ability to turn on or off the instances with just one click.
cons: It requires some bit of technical expertise to work with EC2 and we have to apply patches and security updates on regularly.

review_title: reliable and scalable
description: Overall it is amazing to use as the best feature about EC2 is the auto-scalability which saves a lot of money compared to other solutions.
author: Terence Z.
pros: The biggest pro about using EC2 is that it is auto-scaling. So this allows for the most cost-efficient solution currently in my situation and allows for the ramp up in resources when necessary as well.
cons: No cons about Amazon EC2, it is great and reliable for my use case.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Deploying our containers is efficient for business application as EC2 provides effective isolation
description: 1. We utilize EC2 services offered by Amazon for our container deployments through Docker in Testing & Production environments. 2. Since the infrastructure is provided by AWS, we needn't worry about regional downtime or security updates as they are fully managed by Amazon. 3. We define our docker containers within EC2 instance and we can trust in the isolation between the containers are properly maintained. 4. We can leverage to stop the EC2 instances in case we need to retain the application configurations for a later point in time and start it again for future use. 5. Hosting multiple backend cloud-based applications is feasible with EC2 and all configurational changes can be viewed completely in its CLI.
author: Raamnaaraayan R.
pros: 1. Amazon EC2 offers exceptional capabilities to deploy our customer-centric application in cloud platform at ease. 2. We can effectively utilize its AMI to spin up any type of EC2 instances with any OS based on our business requirements within minutes. 3. Its auto-load balancing feature is helpful when we carry out web hosting with diversified incoming requests from the user. 4. We can also retain snapshots of our EC2 instances which can be used anytime to replicate our application configurations & deployments. 5. As it offers licensing within the charges of its EC2 instances, we are able to utilize various vendor applications and not worry about license renewal or request.
cons: 1. If you wish to perform custom updates, it needs updating a lot of security patches along with its Amazon Machine Image which is quite complex. 2, Network configurations & ACL should be maintained properly so that there isn't any connectivity issues with our EC2-hosted applications. 3. We need to ensure to terminate the EC2 instances if we no longer require the service of it. Charges may incur if its left unchecked.

review_title: AWS EC2 is the ideal service to set up working servers
description: Amazon EC2 is the tool we use to create the server needed for data storage, big data processing and web applications. It is highly recommended in combination with other AWS services (for example Redshift, EMR, Route 53 and others) to get a solid and reliable cloud infrastructure for data management platforms.
author: Filippo C.
pros: A wide range of machine type is available to fit every need. EC2 clusters can be further customized (e.g. with additional storage) and networking and security are easily managed.
cons: Amazon EC2 setup and administration is not straightforward since it requires a solid IT background.

review_title: Amazon EC2: Simplified Server Deployment in the Cloud
description: Can't imagine configuring all these server deployments and publishing them online to be used by clients instantaneously without the cloud IaaS services provided by Amazon EC2.
author: Maha S.
pros: I implemented several server scripts on EC2 Virtual Machines of the M4 instance profile. Using SSH and remote desktop it feels like working on a local server. Dynamic IP management makes advertising cloud servers to the outside world a very simplified task. I tested applications servers (Apache, Apache Tomcat, IIS, Glassfish, etc) on top of the EC2 cloud as well as database servers such as MySQL and DB2. The system is as "elastic" as advertised with a true pay-as-you-go model. That was the main inception behind realizing an actual "utility-computing" based cloud system by Amazon.
cons: The security configuration consisting of generating the private/public keys are not that simply packaged for the beginner developer. But many improvement have been made on this front by Amazon.

review_title: The Standard for Cloud Computing
author: Joel B.
pros: The ability to spool up a server in a few minutes has always blown my mind. I had a recent server failure that resulted in me spooling up a new server to replace it. I was able to get the job done in under two hours. It would have been much faster than that if I had done it before, but there was some learning required in the process. I've documented the process, so the next time this happens, I will be able to get back up and running in minutes. Having been in IT my whole life, this ability is quite amazing. It was the stuff of dreams over a decade ago and now I get to live it out. There are way too many good things to say about EC2. I can have multiple servers spread across the world so I can service my customers locally, instead of them having to traverse continents and oceans to hit up a server. I can attach and detach storage so I can start working from where I last started. The list goes on and on. I want to say that there is a plethora of helpful information available to those who need support. The Amazon support information is great as well as YouTube and other informational sites. If you're Google-Fu is up to date, you can get the help you need without having to pick up the phone.
cons: The biggest con to EC2 is the shear vastness of features, tools, and functionality. For people who are new and want to start off, there is not an easy or simple "get started here" path that I have found. There is so much to learn, and so much you will never know, that getting some help at the beginning should really be considered.

review_title: Best webservice solution for cloud compute capacity
description: We use Amazon EC2 to host our services on the cloud platform to ensure thay they are highly available and are scaled up or down automatically without worrying too much. We also use the Amazon S3 storage which is a great add on to use with the cloud compute platform.
author: Tanuj D.
pros: Amazon EC2 is a market leader in the cloud industry to provide compute capacity. You can host webservices on the Amazon EC2 cloud and pay as per what you use. It is the best solution as you don't have to think about maintaining servers and spend on web services hosting infrastructure. Also Amazon EC2 handles the security aspects of the hosted services via access controls. A lot of webservices written in different programming languages can be hosted on this platform.
cons: There are no limitations for this product. They are a market leader and their services are highly configurable.

review_title: The easiest-to-use Cloud Computing Platform
description: I had to integrate my GCP with AWS EC2 of a partner company. I therefore tried the process by creating a server and testing out the VPN between both GCP and AWS before engaging the other business entity.
author: George M.
pros: The entire process was very simple, required a few steps. The documentation was straight to the point.
cons: I used the trial version but the price was a bit scary. There was no free credit as with GCP. The pros outweighed the cons

review_title: Amazon EC2 - My favourite service in AWS.
description: my overall experience has been a great one so far
author: Shubham K.
pros: It provide best firewall and security features.
cons: I didn't find any drawback as of now. all good.

review_title: The most elastic platform available.
description: I never had problems with this platform, it is really very complete and useful, it has an extremely high level of security, it also integrates very easily and natively with other aws tools, it is a wonderful multipurpose tool, which can be used with or without the other tools of aws.
author: Sophia T.
pros: This tool is extremely versatile, serves as a vps, and as a base instance for many other aws tools, it allows me to connect to external aws platforms simply, it has a high level of configuration, customization and security. I can specifically choose each hardware component that is needed according to the needs of the projects, and the platform is ready to use in a few minutes, in addition to having a very extensive configuration panel, with many configurations, in addition to a console, which allows Work through commands directly, without opening the instance, its download and upload speed is very high and quite stable.
cons: It is difficult for me to think of a negative aspect on this platform, however, what must be taken into account is that it is a fairly complete and complex tool to use, so the learning curve is quite steep.

review_title: Cloud computing done easy with EC2
description: I really enjoyed using EC2 and AWS overall, I have used it for many of my projects and it worked seamlessly.
author: Pawe W.
pros: EC2 was the core infrastructure in the Platform I have developed for a few months. It has provided computing sources for a Web App that was used extensively by hundreds of clients. It was reliable (no downtimes were recorded) and quite easy to set up. We have used different configurations of EC2 to meet our efficiency needs
cons: The learning curve for EC2 and AWS overall is quite steep, so the first steps were quite hard, but it was worth the effort to learn administrating EC2.

review_title: Amazon review
author: Arreybesong V.
pros: Here it helps in the interactions with the machine for easy manipulation
cons: Since I have been using it I have not seen the difficulties about it

review_title: Suitable option to develop and deploy your applications faster
description: It is very helpful service. Many organisations I have worked with have been using this.
author: Rajshekhar S.
pros: It provides a variety of options to create machines with different type of configurations. It is safe, secure and scalable. I started using this service to learn some features.
cons: Some time, my machine stayed open and I did not know about it. After some time I got a mail with certain amount of bill. I was using a free service with limited hours. AWS should have alerted me if I was going over the limit.

review_title: Simple access and no maintenance cost
description: Amazon EC2 has made it possible to carry out the implementation of services or applications in the cloud, thus saving time and money and being able to please any customer with their needs and all for a really fair price.
author: Caroline S.
pros: This Amazon tool is really useful since it has great advantages that is why I like it for several reasons being the main one that is extremely flexible, easy to use, easy to access, requires no maintenance and only pays for what is used, account with an interface that is very intuitive in addition to that in case of having doubts about it provides tutorials or a really compressible documentation so there is no way of not being able to understand its use, also it can be customized to cover each one of the needs that search the user thus being able to host any application, or web service of business or personal interest.
cons: This tool works very well so finding faults as such is difficult, the only drawback is that locating a support team directly can be complicated but it is not impossible.

review_title: AWS EC2 - amazon cloud servers my review
description: overall experience with Amazon EC2 is satisfactory as they are easy to launch and use which reduces time to implement server but just keep an eye on the price and monitoring matrices .
author: krishna Y.
pros: AWS EC2 instances are easy to launch and use we can use any OS we need , AMI are available and we can directly launch them from dash board on AWS cloud . all type of instance are available as per the requirement like general purpose , and instances which are optimised in computation , Memory and Ram can be selected . EBS volume can be attached according to requirement .
cons: when upgrade is required then we have to separately upgrade instance and EBS volume and run command to attach the EBS volume .
